subject: A lynx mid-leap off a stone ledge in an urban plaza, with alarmed bystanders reacting around it
description: A golden-furred lynx is captured mid-leap, launching itself from a stone ledge or low wall toward the viewer. A small red ribbon or cord is visible near its ear or neck. Its eyes are wide and intense, ears back, body fully extended in the pounce. In the background, several robed or cloaked humanoid figures react with alarm — one throws up their hands, others step back. The setting is a sun-lit urban plaza with stone architecture and towers visible in the background, consistent with a densely built city. The overall palette is warm golden and terracotta, with blue sky peeking through the buildings.
foreground: Lynx in full pouncing leap off a stone ledge, red ribbon near ear, intense forward gaze
background: Urban stone plaza, robed bystanders reacting in alarm, stone towers and archways
emotion: feral intensity from the cat; panic and surprise from the background figures
